forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Areas of smoke before 5pm, then haze. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 89. Northwest wind around 13 mph.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Haze. Mostly clear, with a low around 68. Northwest wind 3 to 10 mph.

weather_report:
This afternoon in Boston unveils a scene touched by a gentle haze, as areas of smoke linger from earlier, wrapping the city in a softness that belies the warmth—the mercury flirting with the high eighties. A light northwesterly breeze whispers through the trees, providing the subtle reassurance of movement amid a mostly cloudy sky. As the hours peel away and twilight approaches, expect a gradual shift toward clarity, though not without a lingering haze that settles in for the evening.

As day gives way to night, temperatures will drift into the comfortable embrace of the sixties. The outdoor atmosphere this evening invites leisurely strolls along the Charles, where you might feel the softened breeze against your skin as the city hums with life. It is advisable to dress in light layers, accommodating both the lingering warmth of the day and the cooler whispers of night; a comfortable shirt paired with a lightweight jacket would serve well. While the skies may lack brilliance, they foster a gentle peace, making this a perfect opportunity for quiet conversation under a canopy of stars veiled by thin clouds.
